required_variables.name: DAST_TARGET
required_variables.purpose: HTTPS staging target for OWASP ZAP baseline scans.

required_secrets.name: DEPLOY_SSH_KEY
required_secrets.purpose: Private deploy key used by the VPS deployment job.

required_secrets.name: EXTERNAL_UPTIME_PROVIDER_EVIDENCE_JSON
required_secrets.purpose: Provider-exported external uptime evidence JSON used by the live evidence workflow.

required_secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
required_secrets.purpose: Cloudflare API token with read access for Access application verification.

required_secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCESS_ADMIN_MANIFEST_JSON
required_secrets.purpose: Production Cloudflare Access admin manifest JSON consumed by the live evidence workflow.

required_variables.name: DEPLOY_REMOTE
required_variables.purpose: SSH destination for the VPS deploy user.

required_variables.name: DEPLOY_REMOTE_DIR
required_variables.purpose: Absolute infrastructure path on the VPS.

required_variables.name: DEPLOY_SSH_PORT
required_variables.purpose: Current SSH port used by GitHub Actions to reach the VPS.

required_variables.name: VPS_HARDENED_SSH_PORT
required_variables.purpose: Expected hardened SSH port validated by VPS host readiness.

required_variables.name: PUBLIC_API_HEALTH_URL
required_variables.purpose: Public HTTPS API health endpoint routed through Cloudflare for production load evidence.

required_variables.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
required_variables.purpose: Cloudflare account id used by the Access verification workflow.
